sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Figure Technology (NYSE: FIGR) CEO sells 184,194 shares under plan
feed.summary: Figure Technology Solutions CEO Michael Benjamin Tannenbaum sold 184,194 shares of Class A Common Stock across multiple open-market transactions on April 28-29, 2026, under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. The sales occurred at weighted average prices in the low-to-mid $30 range. Concurrently, he exercised stock options for 12,567 shares at an exercise price of $4.82, and following these transactions, he directly holds 3,193,641 Class A shares.

feed.title: Mitsubishi UFJ Trust & Banking Corp Increases Position in Flex Ltd. $FLEX
feed.summary: Mitsubishi UFJ Trust & Banking Corp significantly increased its stake in Flex Ltd. by 220.6% in Q4 2025, adding 170,879 shares to hold a total of 248,349 shares valued at approximately $15.0 million. This move is part of a broader trend of increased institutional investment in Flex, with overall institutional ownership reaching 94.3%. Flex has also reported strong financial performance, beating Q4 revenue and EPS estimates and providing positive FY2026 guidance, while analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a target price of $72.30.

feed.title: Mitsubishi UFJ Trust & Banking Corp Sells 24,298 Shares of Verisk Analytics, Inc. $VRSK
feed.summary: Mitsubishi UFJ Trust & Banking Corp significantly reduced its stake in Verisk Analytics, Inc. (NASDAQ:VRSK) by 21.4% in the fourth quarter, selling 24,298 shares. Verisk Analytics reported strong Q1 earnings, beating analyst expectations with $1.82 EPS and $782.6 million in revenue, driven by robust demand for its analytics services. The company also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.50 per share and announced a $2.50 billion stock repurchase program, while facing a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating and an average price target of $238.20 from analysts.

feed.title: Mitsubishi UFJ Trust & Banking Corp Trims Stock Position in Snap-On Incorporated $SNA
feed.summary: Mitsubishi UFJ Trust & Banking Corp reduced its holdings in Snap-On Incorporated by 33.8% in Q4, selling 30,262 shares and now owning 59,363 shares worth $20.46 million. Despite this, other institutional investors have recently adjusted their stakes in the company. Snap-On has received a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, with an average target price of $381.20, and recently announced a quarterly dividend of $2.44 per share, along with a $500 million share repurchase plan.

feed.title: BTIG lowers Stryker stock price target to $379 on cybersecurity hit
feed.summary: BTIG has lowered its price target for Stryker (NYSE:SYK) to $379 from $397, while maintaining a Buy rating. This adjustment follows Stryker's first-quarter 2026 results, which fell below estimates due to an international cybersecurity incident that impacted procedures and capital order fulfillment. Despite the Q1 shortfall, Stryker has maintained its full-year 2026 guidance, expecting to recover lost sales and showing confidence in its long-term business fundamentals.

feed.title: Mitsubishi UFJ Trust & Banking Corp Sells 179,875 Shares of State Street Corporation $STT
feed.summary: Mitsubishi UFJ Trust & Banking Corp significantly reduced its stake in State Street Corporation by selling 179,875 shares, now holding 0.05% of the company valued at $18.45 million. Despite this, State Street recently reported strong quarterly earnings, topping analyst estimates with EPS of $2.84 and revenue of $3.80 billion, leading to a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating and an average price target of $154 from analysts. Insider selling has also been noted, with 28,711 shares sold in the last 90 days.

feed.title: Paycom Software, Inc. $PAYC Holdings Cut by Mitsubishi UFJ Trust & Banking Corp
feed.summary: Mitsubishi UFJ Trust & Banking Corp significantly reduced its stake in Paycom Software, Inc. by 12.3% in the fourth quarter, selling 18,123 shares. Despite this, other institutional investors increased their holdings, and 87.77% of the stock is owned by institutions. Paycom Software also recently announced a quarterly dividend and analysts have issued various price targets and ratings, with a consensus "Hold" rating.

feed.title: Mitsubishi UFJ Trust & Banking Corp Takes Position in Fiserv, Inc. $FISV
feed.summary: Mitsubishi UFJ Trust & Banking Corp recently acquired a new position of 228,788 shares in Fiserv, Inc. (NASDAQ:FISV) during the fourth quarter, valued at approximately $15.37 million. This investment contributes to Fiserv's high institutional ownership of nearly 91%. Despite a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts and some recent target price cuts, Fiserv exceeded its quarterly EPS and revenue estimates and set strong FY2026 guidance.

feed.title: Executive VP of Technology & Chief Security Officer Of VeriSign Sold 31% Of Their Shares
feed.summary: Danny McPherson, VeriSign's Executive VP of Technology & Chief Security Officer, recently sold US$1.4m worth of stock, reducing his total holding by 31%. This sale contributes to a trend of more insider selling than buying at VeriSign over the last year, although the company maintains high insider ownership. Investors are advised to consider this insider activity along with other risk factors.

feed.title: Pictet Asset Management Holding SA Grows Position in EOG Resources, Inc. $EOG

Despite significant insider selling over the past 90 days, institutional investors and hedge funds collectively own a substantial 89.91% of the company's stock. EOG Resources also reported beating quarterly EPS estimates and announced a quarterly dividend of $1.02 per share, contributing to its "Moderate Buy" consensus rating among analysts.

feed.title: Pictet Asset Management Holding SA Sells 80,113 Shares of ONEOK, Inc. $OKE

Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in the company. ONEOK reported mixed Q1 earnings, missing EPS estimates but exceeding revenue expectations, while analysts have a mixed view on the stock with an average "Hold" rating.

feed.title: MetLife, Inc. $MET Shares Sold by Pictet Asset Management Holding SA
feed.summary: Pictet Asset Management Holding SA reduced its stake in MetLife, Inc. by 20.3% in the fourth quarter, selling over 84,000 shares. Despite this, other hedge funds and institutional investors increased their positions in MET. The article also highlights MetLife's recent dividend increase, positive Q1 EPS expectations, and ongoing real estate investments, alongside various analyst ratings.

feed.title: Flutter Cancels New Tranche of Shares Under Ongoing $5 Billion Buyback
feed.summary: Flutter Entertainment has redeemed and cancelled 11,860 U.S.-traded ordinary shares at an average price of $106.4959 per share, reducing its outstanding share count. This move is part of an ongoing $250 million buyback program, which is itself a component of a larger $5 billion share repurchase plan. The action highlights the company's commitment to capital allocation and shareholder returns.

feed.title: Deere taps 20-year veteran Brent Norwood for CFO role
feed.summary: Deere & Company has appointed Brent Norwood, a 20-year company veteran, as its new senior vice president and chief financial officer, effective May 1, 2026. Norwood, 44, previously led finance for Construction and Forestry and John Deere Power Systems and was instrumental in significant acquisitions and the development of Deere's Smart Industrial strategy. His selection follows an extensive internal and external search, highlighting his deep financial expertise and strategic judgment.

feed.title: Pictet Asset Management Holding SA Boosts Stock Holdings in L3Harris Technologies Inc $LHX
feed.summary: Pictet Asset Management Holding SA increased its stake in L3Harris Technologies Inc. by 5.1% to 76,415 shares, valued at approximately $22.43 million, bringing institutional ownership to 84.76%. L3Harris reported strong Q1 results, beating EPS and revenue expectations, and raised its FY-2026 EPS guidance, although the stock experienced a pullback due to profit-taking and guidance nuances. Analyst sentiment remains "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $349.55, with several firms upgrading ratings or price targets.

feed.title: Deere & Company Board Elects Brent Norwood as Chief Financial Officer
feed.summary: Deere & Company has announced the election of Brent Norwood, 44, as senior vice president and chief financial officer, effective May 1. Norwood brings over 20 years of experience within Deere and the financial industry, having previously served as vice president and finance director for the company's Construction and Forestry division and John Deere Power Systems. His appointment follows a thorough internal and external search and is expected to contribute to the company's strategic execution and long-term value creation.

feed.title: Gilead Sciences to Present at Upcoming Second Quarter 2026 Investor Conferences
feed.summary: Gilead Sciences, Inc. (Nasdaq: GILD) announced that its executives will be presenting at four investor conferences in May and June 2026, including the BofA Securities, RBC Capital Markets, Bernstein, and Goldman Sachs conferences. Live webcasts and replays will be available on the company's investors page. Gilead, a biopharmaceutical company, focuses on developing medicines for life-threatening diseases such as HIV, viral hepatitis, COVID-19, and cancer.

feed.title: Ford Marks America’s 250th by Putting American Values to Work
feed.summary: Ford Motor Company is launching its "American Value. For American Values." campaign to commemorate America's 250th anniversary. This initiative offers employee pricing to customers on most new 2025 and 2026 Ford and Lincoln vehicles, aiming to make them more accessible. The campaign underscores Ford's commitment to U.S. workers, manufacturing, and communities, lasting through July 6, and also includes dealer-led community support efforts.

feed.title: Performance Comparison: Amazon.com And Competitors In Broadline Retail Industry
feed.summary: This article analyzes Amazon.com's financial performance against its broadline retail industry competitors, highlighting key metrics like Debt-to-Equity, P/E, P/B, P/S ratios, ROE, EBITDA, gross profit, and revenue growth. Amazon demonstrates a strong financial position with a lower debt-to-equity ratio and superior profitability and growth compared to its peers. While its P/E ratio suggests potential undervaluation, high P/B and P/S ratios indicate the market might value its assets and sales highly.

feed.title: Pictet Asset Management Holding SA Has $21.78 Million Stake in Allegion PLC $ALLE
feed.summary: Pictet Asset Management Holding SA significantly reduced its stake in Allegion PLC by 67.2% in Q4, now holding 136,811 shares valued at $21.78 million. Allegion reported quarterly EPS of $1.80, missing estimates but reaffirmed its FY2026 guidance. The company also announced a $500 million share repurchase plan and a quarterly dividend of $0.55 per share.

feed.title: Pictet Asset Management Holding SA Reduces Stock Position in Equity Residential $EQR

feed.title: AMETEK, Inc. $AME Shares Purchased by Pictet Asset Management Holding SA

AMETEK reported strong Q1 results, beating EPS and revenue estimates, raised its full-year guidance for 2026, and increased its quarterly dividend. The company's stock is trading near its one-year high, and analysts have a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with a target price of $244.67.

feed.title: Pictet Asset Management Holding SA Sells 1,178,416 Shares of Fidelity National Information Services, Inc. $FIS

feed.title: Pictet Asset Management Holding SA Has $26.47 Million Holdings in Ross Stores, Inc. $ROST

feed.title: Kestra Private Wealth Services LLC Buys 4,955 Shares of Ross Stores, Inc. $ROST

This comes after Ross Stores exceeded quarterly earnings expectations, reporting an EPS of $2.00 against an estimated $1.90, and revenues of $6.64 billion. The company also raised its quarterly dividend to $0.445 per share.

feed.title: FIVN Q1 Deep Dive: AI Revenue Acceleration and Strategic Shifts Drive Outlook
feed.summary: Five9 (FIVN) exceeded Q1 revenue expectations, driven by accelerating subscription growth and a 68% surge in AI-related revenue. The company also improved its operating margin due to a more disciplined organizational structure. Management raised full-year revenue and Adjusted EPS guidance, signaling confidence in AI-driven contact center solutions and a shift towards platform-based consumption as key drivers for future growth.

feed.title: Pictet Asset Management Holding SA Has $23.06 Million Stock Position in Comfort Systems USA, Inc. $FIX
feed.summary: Pictet Asset Management Holding SA significantly increased its stake in Comfort Systems USA, Inc. by 401.9% in the fourth quarter, now owning 24,708 shares valued at approximately $23.06 million. This increase follows Comfort Systems USA's strong Q1 earnings, which beat analyst expectations with $10.51 EPS and $2.87 billion in revenue, leading to a "Moderate Buy" consensus analyst rating and an average price target of $1,923.20. The company also raised its quarterly dividend to $0.80 per share, while institutional ownership remains high at 96.51% despite some insider selling.

feed.title: Pictet Asset Management Holding SA Has $27.65 Million Stake in Phillips 66 $PSX
feed.summary: Pictet Asset Management Holding SA increased its stake in Phillips 66 (NYSE:PSX) by 5.5% in the fourth quarter, bringing its total holdings to 214,279 shares valued at $27.65 million. Other institutional investors like Vanguard Group Inc. and M&T Bank Corp also significantly increased their positions in the oil and gas company. Analysts have issued varied ratings for Phillips 66, with an average target price of $183.17, while the company recently reported strong Q1 earnings, beating estimates.

feed.title: A Look At Eastman Chemical (EMN) Valuation As Shares Trade Near Indicated Discount
feed.summary: Eastman Chemical (EMN) shares are trading around 9% below the average analyst target and show an indicated intrinsic discount of about 45%, suggesting a potential opportunity for investors. The valuation is based on a future earnings narrative driven by cost reductions and strategic optimization, leading to improved margins and higher ROIC. However, the outlook depends on the stability of end markets, with potential risks from trade tensions or weaker demand in sectors like autos and construction.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: Exponent Q1 2026 sees stock rise post-earnings
feed.summary: Exponent Inc. reported Q1 2026 earnings, with EPS of $0.57 exceeding forecasts and revenue of $144.47 million meeting expectations. The company's stock rose by 1.07% in aftermarket trading, reflecting strong performance driven by AI integration in consumer electronics and increased demand from energy and utility sectors. Exponent's CEO highlighted a strategic focus on innovation, while new President John Pye and CFO Eric Anderson were introduced, signaling a leadership evolution to capitalize on developing market trends.

feed.title: FibroBiologics (FBLG) low cash, $5M loss and going concern risk
feed.summary: FibroBiologics (FBLG) reported a net loss of $5.0 million for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, with cash and cash equivalents of only $1.5 million. The company faces significant going concern risk without additional capital, despite raising $0.7 million in March and $2.5 million net in April through equity offerings. FBLG is a pre-revenu medical research company focusing on fibroblast-based therapies and is advancing several programs towards clinical trials, but also disclosed a material weakness in its internal financial controls.

feed.title: B. Riley Securities Maintains Extreme Networks(EXTR.US) With Buy Rating, Raises Target Price to $28
feed.summary: B. Riley Securities has reiterated its Buy rating on Extreme Networks (EXTR.US) and increased its target price for the stock to $28. This update reflects the firm's continued confidence in the company's performance and future prospects. Investors will likely view this increased target price as a positive indicator for EXTR.US.

feed.title: Euroseas Expands Feeder Containership Newbuilding Program With Four-Vessel Order
feed.summary: Euroseas (ESEA) has announced an expansion of its newbuilding program with an order for four additional feeder containerships, bringing its total newbuilding pipeline to ten vessels. These new ships, scheduled for delivery between June 2028 and January 2029, will be financed through debt and equity and are designed to meet EEDI Phase 3 and IMO Nox Tier III emission standards. This expansion enhances the company's earnings visibility beyond 2028 and strengthens its position in the feeder container market.

feed.title: FCHL to Effect Share Consolidation on May 4, 2026
feed.summary: FCHL announced that it will effect a share consolidation on May 4, 2026. This corporate action will likely reduce the number of outstanding shares, potentially impacting the stock price and market capitalization per share. Investors should monitor this development for its implications on their holdings.

feed.title: Analyst Reiterates Buy on Embecta, Maintains $22 Price Target Amid Core Strength and Platform Expansion
feed.summary: BTIG analyst Marie Thibault reiterated a Buy rating on Embecta Corporation, maintaining a $22 price target. This positive outlook is based on the company's resilient core diabetes business, consistent financial performance despite market challenges, and strategic expansion into a broader medical supplies platform, including opportunities related to GLP-1 and the upcoming Owen Mumford acquisition. Thibault believes the company's disciplined execution and future growth optionality justify its current valuation.

feed.title: Evertec Completes Dimensa Acquisition to Expand Brazil Fintech
feed.summary: Evertec Brasil Informática S.A. has successfully acquired 100% of Dimensa S.A., a Brazilian financial technology provider, for approximately R$981 million (USD$197 million). This strategic all-cash deal, funded from Evertec's existing liquidity, is intended to expand Evertec’s presence in Brazil's fintech sector and strengthen its relationships with local financial institutions. Analyst ratings currently place EVTC as a Hold with a $29.00 price target, while TipRanks’ AI Analyst, Spark, rates it Neutral due to solid fundamentals tempered by leverage and negative technical momentum.

feed.title: Eaton Vance Senior Income Trust (NYSE: EVF) offers $24,500 per preferred share
feed.summary: Eaton Vance Senior Income Trust (EVF) has announced an issuer tender offer to purchase up to 100% of its outstanding Auction Preferred Shares, Series A and B. The offer is for $24,500 per share, which represents 98% of the $25,000 liquidation preference, plus accrued dividends through May 29, 2026. As of March 31, 2026, there were 1,504 preferred shares outstanding.

feed.title: EverCommerce (EVCM) CEO sells 19,200 shares in open-market trades
feed.summary: EverCommerce (EVCM) CEO Eric Richard Remer sold a total of 19,200 shares of common stock in open-market transactions across three days, with weighted average prices ranging from $11.4859 to $11.8355 per share. After these sales, Remer directly holds 2,914,923 shares and has additional indirect holdings through family trusts and Buckrail Partners, LLC. The sales were conducted under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan.

feed.title: UBS Group AG Sells 714,768 Shares of Corteva, Inc. $CTVA
feed.summary: UBS Group AG significantly reduced its stake in Corteva, Inc. by selling 714,768 shares, now holding 2,025,140 shares valued at $135.745 million. This follows Corteva's recent quarterly earnings report which met EPS estimates but fell short on revenue, and the company announced a quarterly dividend. Insider activity also saw a notable sale of shares by Brian Titus.

feed.title: Eureka-led Estrella (NASDAQ: ESLA) details 59.3% control and board pay
feed.summary: Estrella Immunopharma (NASDAQ: ESLA) filed an amended annual report (10-K/A) for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025, providing detailed disclosures on board composition, executive compensation, beneficial ownership, and auditor matters. The filing revealed that CEO Dr. Cheng Liu and CFO Peter Xu each earned $250,962 in salary for 2025, and that Eureka Therapeutics, Inc. beneficially owns approximately 59.3% of Estrella's common stock, classifying it as a "controlled company" under Nasdaq rules.

feed.title: UBS Group AG Sells 56,938 Shares of Jack Henry & Associates, Inc. $JKHY
feed.summary: UBS Group AG reduced its stake in Jack Henry & Associates (NASDAQ: JKHY) by 6.7% in the fourth quarter, selling 56,938 shares and concluding the period with 790,064 shares valued at approximately $144.17 million. Despite the sale, Jack Henry & Associates reported strong quarterly results, beating EPS and revenue expectations, and raised its quarterly dividend to $0.61 per share. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for the company with an average price target of $200.15.

feed.title: Eldorado Gold Says Production Continues To Be Weighted To Second Half of the Year
feed.summary: Eldorado Gold reiterated that its production will be weighted towards the second half of the year. The company's full-year outlook remains unchanged, and it highlighted strong gold sales and cash flow generation in the first quarter of 2026.

feed.title: UBS Group AG Acquires 475,951 Shares of Brown & Brown, Inc. $BRO
feed.summary: UBS Group AG recently increased its stake in Brown & Brown, Inc. (NYSE:BRO) by 31.8% in Q4 2026, purchasing an additional 475,951 shares, bringing its total holdings to 1,972,258 shares valued at approximately $157.19 million. Despite strong financial performance and a declared quarterly dividend of $0.165, analyst sentiment remains cautious with a consensus "Hold" rating, attributed to various price target downgrades by several firms.

feed.title: UBS Group AG Has $146.63 Million Stake in TechnipFMC plc $FTI
feed.summary: UBS Group AG increased its stake in TechnipFMC plc by 20.3% in Q4, now owning over 3.29 million shares valued at $146.63 million. TechnipFMC's Q1 results showed an EPS beat but a slight revenue miss, and the company announced a small quarterly dividend. Despite significant insider selling, institutional ownership remains high, and analysts generally rate the stock a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $61.73.

feed.title: Esquire Financial Declares Quarterly Dividend, Signaling Ongoing Stability
feed.summary: Esquire Financial Holdings (ESQ) has declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.20 per share, payable on June 1, 2026. This dividend highlights the company's financial stability and commitment to shareholder returns, particularly within its specialized markets of the litigation industry and small businesses. ESQ stock is rated as "Outperform" by TipRanks’ AI Analyst, Spark, based on strong fundamentals and recent corporate events.

feed.title: UBS Group AG Has $159.19 Million Position in Keysight Technologies Inc. $KEYS
feed.summary: UBS Group AG has significantly increased its stake in Keysight Technologies Inc. by 35.5% in the fourth quarter, now holding 783,446 shares valued at $159.19 million. Despite some insider selling, institutional ownership remains high at 84.58%, and analysts have raised price targets, contributing to a "Moderate Buy" consensus. Keysight also reported strong quarterly earnings and provided positive FY2026 guidance.

feed.title: Invesco Ltd. (NYSE:IVZ) Short Interest Update
feed.summary: Invesco Ltd. (NYSE:IVZ) saw a 14.0% increase in short interest in April, reaching 20.39 million shares, representing 4.7% of the total shares sold short with a 3.3 days-to-cover ratio. The company reported Q1 EPS of $0.57, slightly missing consensus, with revenue up 14% year-over-year. Analysts currently hold a "Hold" rating with a consensus price target of $27.29, and Invesco recently raised its quarterly dividend to $0.215 per share.

feed.title: Sunrise New Energy Delays 20-F Amid Rising Losses
feed.summary: Sunrise New Energy Co (E-Power Inc.) has announced a delay in filing its Form 20-F (Yearly Report) for fiscal year 2025 due to time constraints in compiling detailed information. The company anticipates filing within 15 calendar days of the original due date. Preliminary unaudited figures for 2025 indicate a significant deterioration in financial performance, with projected revenue decline of 28.6% and a net loss widening by 45.5% to $26.2 million, mainly due to shifts in customer portfolio, product mix, lower sales volumes, and increased financing and equity-related costs.

feed.title: UBS Group AG Sells 1,136,106 Shares of Arch Capital Group Ltd. $ACGL
feed.summary: UBS Group AG significantly reduced its stake in Arch Capital Group Ltd. by selling 1,136,106 shares in Q4, leading to a 41.5% decrease in its holdings. Despite this, other institutional investors have recently boosted their positions in the insurance provider. Arch Capital Group currently holds a "Hold" rating from analysts with a consensus price target of $108.04.
